// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using System.Linq;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all default services.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::TestNamespace.Repository<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.Repository<>));
            services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::TestNamespace.IRepository<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.Repository<>));
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.AggregateService>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) =>
            {
                var f_p0 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.IRepository<global::TestNamespace.Customer>>();
                var f_p1 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.IRepository<global::TestNamespace.Order>>();
                var f_p2 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.IRepository<global::TestNamespace.Product>>();
                return (global::TestNamespace.AggregateService)global::TestNamespace.AggregateServiceFactory.Create(sp, f_p0, f_p1, f_p2);
            });
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IAggregateService>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) =>
            {
                var f_p0 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.IRepository<global::TestNamespace.Customer>>();
                var f_p1 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.IRepository<global::TestNamespace.Order>>();
                var f_p2 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.IRepository<global::TestNamespace.Product>>();
                return global::TestNamespace.AggregateServiceFactory.Create(sp, f_p0, f_p1, f_p2);
            });
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.Customer>, global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.Customer>>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IRepository<global::TestNamespace.Customer>>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.Customer>>());
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.Order>, global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.Order>>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IRepository<global::TestNamespace.Order>>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.Order>>());
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.Product>, global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.Product>>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IRepository<global::TestNamespace.Product>>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.Repository<global::TestNamespace.Product>>());

            return services;
        }
    }
}
